behavioral_meaning: Contentment and social bonding. Also used for self-soothing when stressed or injured.
behavioral_response: Human/cat companion remains close. Mutual relaxation.
translation_template: I feel completely safe with you right now. This is exactly where I want to be.

intensity_modifiers.high: This is PERFECT. Don't move. Don't change anything. I am in absolute bliss right now.
intensity_modifiers.medium: I'm comfortable here with you. Keep doing what you're doing.
intensity_modifiers.low: This is nice. I feel okay.

call_pattern: Loud hiss with arched back, ears flattened
behavioral_meaning: Defensive threat. Cat is frightened and will attack if pressed further.
behavioral_response: Threat source should retreat. Cat may flee or attack.
translation_template: BACK OFF! I am terrified and I WILL scratch you if you come any closer!

intensity_modifiers.high: STAY AWAY FROM ME! I'm cornered and I WILL fight! This is your ONLY warning!
intensity_modifiers.medium: I don't like this. Back up. Give me an escape route.
intensity_modifiers.low: I'm a bit nervous. Please don't crowd me.

call_pattern: Rapid chattering/clicking sounds while watching prey through window
behavioral_meaning: Predatory arousal and frustration. Cat sees prey it cannot reach.
behavioral_response: Hunting behavior intensifies. May pounce if access becomes available.
translation_template: That bird is RIGHT THERE and I can't get to it. I can almost taste it. So close!

intensity_modifiers.high: OH MY GOD that bird is RIGHT THERE! Let me OUT! I need to CATCH it! SO CLOSE!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Look at that bird... if only I could get through this window...
intensity_modifiers.low: Interesting. A bird. I'm watching it.

call_pattern: Loud, prolonged meowing, often at night
behavioral_meaning: Attention-seeking or distress. Meows are inter-species communication evolved specifically for humans.
behavioral_response: Owner provides food, attention, or opens door.
translation_template: Hello?! I need something and you're ignoring me! Pay attention to me RIGHT NOW!

intensity_modifiers.high: HELLO?! I've been calling for AGES! Feed me! Let me out! DO SOMETHING!
intensity_modifiers.medium: Hey, human — I need your attention. Can you come here please?
intensity_modifiers.low: Excuse me. When you get a moment, I'd like something.
